The '''Grand ChikatLik''' was the first [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[ChikatLik]]. Nearly a [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] wide, in [[71 BBY]] it was made into the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] premiere [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
